scenarios.name: create-go-dockerfile
scenarios.rationale: Both Dockerfiles use multi-stage builds, pin base images, copy go.mod/go.sum first, and run as non-root, but only Response B includes the vendor directory in .dockerignore, making it slightly more complete.

scenarios.name: compose-node-postgres
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B omits the restart policy for the db service.
